assignments.description: Add photo names to the Case - Order. Set the Photo Attached field to True.
assignments.name: SetPhotoAttachedI
assignments.label: SetPhotoAttached

assignments.description: The workflow is different if Orders are not available in Salesforce. This is a temporary condition because B2B Commerce is being rolled out after Cases.
assignments.name: SetWorkflowMode
assignments.label: SetWorkflowMode

assignments.description: Assign the value captured on the screen flow to the JDE SO # field. A text field was used on the object so that the input can be made mandatory when displayed but not when it is not displayed.
assignments.name: Update_JDE_SO
assignments.label: Update JDE SO #

decisions.description: checks the number of order products included
decisions.name: Num_of_Order_Products
decisions.label: Num of Order Products

Flow.description: Adds field selection to NATT Case Link Parts Screen

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: AdditionalDetailCustomerCommentsFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.NATT_Case_Reason__c}, "Incorrect Manual",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Defective Shelf",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Package Labeled Wrong ",1, "Direct Ship Shortage",1, "Direct Ship Overage",1, "Freight Company O&S",1, "Part Incomplete/Missing Components",1, "Shortage",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1, "Annual Returns",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Overage",1, "Customer Ordered in Error",1, "Return Request",1, "Freight Charge / Surcharge",1, "New Part Set-up",1, "Technical Question",1, "NSU/Pricing",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: DisputedQuantityFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.NATT_Case_Reason__c}, "Incorrect Manual",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Defective Shelf",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Direct Ship Shortage",1, "Direct Ship Overage",1, "Expedite - unit down/emergency orders",1, "Freight Company O&S",1, "Part Incomplete/Missing Components",1, "Shortage",1, "Annual Returns",1, "Invoice issue",1, "Overage",1, "Customer Ordered in Error",1, "Return Request",1, "Expedite - unit down / emergency orders",1, "Order Entry Error",1, "Order Status/Tracking",1, "Technical Question",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: ModelSerialNumberFieldVisible

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: PackingSlipFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE({!Get_Case_Information.NATT_Case_Reason__c}, "Incorrect Manual",1, "Concealed Damage",1, "Defective Shelf",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Direct Ship Shortage",1, "Direct Ship Overage",1, "Freight Company O&S",1, "Part Incomplete/Missing Components",1, "Shortage",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1 ,0 ) == 1

formulas.description: Determines if the Screen field should be visible
formulas.name: PhotoFieldVisible
formulas.expression: CASE( {!Get_Case_Information.NATT_Case_Reason__c}, "Concealed Damage",1, "Defective Shelf",1, "Freight Company Damage",1, "Incorrect Part Received",1, "Package Labeled Wrong",1, "Freight Company Complaints",1 ,0 ) == 1

Flow.interviewLabel: NATT Case Link Parts Screen II {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: NATT Case Link Parts Screen II

loops.description: Count the number of photos attached
loops.name: CheckPhotosI
loops.label: CheckPhotosI

loops.description: Count the number of photos attached
loops.name: CheckPhotosII
loops.label: CheckPhotosII

screens.description: lets the user update fields that go directly on the case sales order that gets created
screens.name: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields
screens.label: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields

value.stringValue: Attached photos will be available in the Files on the related list on the Case.

screens.description: lets the user update fields that go directly on the case sales order that gets created
screens.name: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields_0
screens.label: UpdateCaseSalesOrderFields

fields.name: AddFieldsDisplayText_0
fields.fieldText: Update Values for the Order or Product

fields.name: SalesOrderInstructions
fields.fieldText: Update Values for the Carrier Sales Order and/or Part Number.

fields.name: PartNumberLinkInstructions
fields.fieldText: Select Part Number by clicking the box below and typing in a part name/description (e.g., generator) or specifying the Part Number.

fields.name: PartNumberFreeFormInstructions
fields.fieldText: It is always best to use the Part Number Link to specify a Part Number. This reduces Case processing time. If you are not able to use the Part Number Link please include the part number in the Part # (free form text) box and Part # Description (free form text) box below.

value.stringValue: Attached photos will be available in the Files on the related list on the Case.

variables.description: The Case Order junction object to create
variables.name: colCaseSalesOrderRecords

variables.description: Photos for the Sales - Order are attached to the Case for ease of access. The names are stored on the Case - Order.
variables.name: NATT_PhotosAttached

variables.description: At initial rollout of Cases the Orders were not available in Salesforce. This variable is used to determine if an alternative workflow should be applied.
variables.name: OrdersAvailableinSalesforce

variables.description: Single Variable to combine names of files attached into a text stream.
variables.name: PhotosAttachedSingleVariable

variables.description: contains the last file name of the looped text collection, file uploaded
variables.name: varFileName
